hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" resume || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'

SessionStart.description: Restore previous session context + load project memory and evolved skills

hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" guard || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'

PreToolUse.description: Block dangerous commands (force push, prod DB drop, rm -rf /)

hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" observe || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'

PostToolUse.description: Record Bash tool result for evolution loop (Codex PostToolUse only intercepts Bash)

hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" reflect || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'

Stop.description: Analyze session observations -> evolve skills -> gate mutations
